findings.issue: Authorization handling is not implemented using DCL despite containing sensitive customer data
findings.recommendation: Implement proper authorization controls using DCL (Data Control Language) and change @AccessControl.authorizationCheck to #CHECK or #CONTROL

findings.issue: Annotations lack proper documentation and may not be fully meaningful
findings.recommendation: Add more descriptive documentation to the @EndUserText.label annotation and consider adding additional relevant annotations like @UI.selectionField or @UI.lineItem
